\section*{Korean Font \& Package Test}

This document verifies that the \texttt{kotex} package and Korean fonts are correctly installed in the PAXEL Docker environment.

\vspace{1cm}

\textbf{Korean Text Test:}
\begin{itemize}
    \item 한글 출력 테스트입니다. (Default Font)
    \item \textsf{고딕체 테스트} (Sans-serif)
    \item \texttt{타자기체 테스트} (Monospace)
\end{itemize}

\vspace{1cm}

\textbf{System Information:}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Class: article
    \item Package: kotex
    \item Engine: XeLaTeX
\end{itemize}
